examples.ko: 수업 중에는 교실 문을 닫아 주세요.
examples.en: Please close the classroom door during class.

examples.ko: 공원 입구에 큰 문이 세워져 있습니다.
examples.en: A large gate is built at the entrance of the park.
It was hot, so I studied with the door open.

examples.ko: 초인종 소리가 나서 문을 열었더니 친구였습니다.
examples.en: The doorbell rang and when I opened the door, it was my friend.

examples.ko: 늦게 집에 왔더니 문이 잠겨 있었습니다.
examples.en: When I came home late, the door was locked.
I asked a passerby for directions.
I want to ask the teacher about the homework.
We buried grandfather in his hometown.

examples.ko: 오래된 비밀을 마음속 깊이 묻어 두었습니다.
examples.en: I buried an old secret deep in my heart.
I asked the store clerk about the price of the item.

examples.ko: 처음 만나는 사람에게 이름을 물어도 됩니까?
examples.en: Is it okay to ask someone you meet for the first time their name?
I buried the flower seeds in the pot and watered them.
The reporter asked the president several questions.

examples.situation: When wanting to know the reason
examples.en: I asked my friend why they were late.

examples.ko: 어떤 색이 더 예쁜지 어머니께 물었습니다.
examples.en: I asked my mother which color was prettier.

examples.ko: 운동을 하고 나서 차가운 물을 마셨습니다.
examples.en: After exercising, I drank cold water.
I poured water into the pot and boiled ramen.

examples.ko: 매일 아침 화분에 물을 주는 것이 습관입니다.
examples.en: It is a habit to water the plants every morning.

examples.ko: 물은 소중한 자원이니 아껴 써야 합니다.
examples.en: Water is a precious resource, so we must use it carefully.
I woke up in the morning and washed my face with cold water.

examples.ko: 수영장 물이 너무 차가워서 바로 들어가기 어려웠습니다.
examples.en: The pool water was too cold, so it was hard to get in right away.

examples.ko: 비가 와서 길에 물이 많이 고였습니다.
examples.en: It rained, and a lot of water pooled on the road.

examples.ko: 강물이 맑고 깨끗해서 물고기가 잘 보였습니다.
examples.en: The river water was clear and clean, so the fish were clearly visible.

examples.ko: 하루에 물을 여덟 잔 이상 마시는 것이 건강에 좋습니다.
examples.en: Drinking more than eight glasses of water a day is good for your health.
Heavy rain came and the water overflowed in the village.
What do you want to eat for dinner tonight?
What are you going to do on the weekend?
What would be a good birthday gift for my friend?
What can I help you with?

examples.ko: 지금 뭐라고 했어요? 잘 못 들었습니다.
examples.en: What did you just say? I didn't hear it well.
What is today's homework?
What did you need that brought you here?
What are you interested in these days?
What's going on? What's the problem?

examples.ko: 오늘 뭐 볼까요? 같이 정해 봐요.
examples.en: What shall we watch today? Let's decide together.
The key had fallen under the bed.
I put my bag under the desk.
Homeless people were living under the bridge.

examples.ko: 서류 더미 밑에 중요한 서류가 있었습니다.
examples.en: An important document was at the bottom of the pile of papers.
I laid small stones at the bottom of the flowerpot.

examples.ko: 더운 날 나무 밑에서 잠시 쉬었습니다.
examples.en: On a hot day, I rested briefly under the tree.
I drew a line under the important content.
I stored luggage under the stairs for a while.

examples.ko: 옷 밑에 숨겨 놓은 편지를 발견했습니다.
examples.en: I found a letter hidden under the clothes.

examples.ko: 물 밑에는 우리가 모르는 세계가 있습니다.
examples.en: There is a world we do not know about below the water.
